field_values.action_summary: Tars Tarkas and Kantos Kan lead a fleet of Thark vessels toward Helium, only to intercept a Zodangan siege force. A massive aerial battle ensues between the fleets. The tide turns with the arrival of the Heliumite navy and superior Thark marksmanship. The conflict ends when the Zodangan commanders commit ritualistic suicide by plunging from their vessels, leading to a total surrender.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide aerial shots of fleets; Medium tracking shots of Thark warriors firing; Close-ups of Zodangan commanders' ritualistic descent; POV shots from vessels
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Vessel positions in the sky relative to fleet formation
Total count of remaining ships during melee
Direction of flight paths during combat maneuvers
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH026_SC001

## Production Intent
Execute a large-scale aerial naval engagement between Thark vessels and Zodangan siege forces, transitioning from chaotic combat to a somber victory following the ritualistic suicide of enemy commanders.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- tars_tarkas
- kantos_kan
- Zodangan Commanders

## Required Environments
- aerial_battle_skies (Combat zone and command decks)

## Continuity Constraints
- Vessel positions in the sky relative to fleet formation
- Total count of remaining ships during melee
- Direction of flight paths during combat maneuvers

## Beat List
- BT001: Fleet interception
- BT002: Massive aerial battle
- BT003: Tide turns via Heliumite arrival
- BT004: Ritualistic surrender/suicide
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
